items.title: NEAR protocol leads AI token rally with a 50% pump: Is $5 NEAR price next?
items.summary: NEAR price surges 50% in a week as AI token momentum, Nvidia optimism and network upgrades fuel bullish sentiment.

items.title: Tom Emmer brushes off law enforcement concerns over Clarity Act
items.summary: House Majority Whip Tom Emmer said concerns from law enforcement groups about crypto developer protections are being overstated.

items.title: Congress hits Polymarket and Kalshi with a massive insider trading probe
items.summary: Rep. James Comer is demanding internal records from the prediction market CEOs, warning that government employees could be using classified information to make “huge profits”.

items.title: Bitcoin implied volatility drops to 7 month low despite macro risks
items.summary: BTC's implied volatility is a picture of calm even as financial headlines warn of macro risks.

items.title: Bitcoin trades near $77,700 as analysts eye $75,000 support after liquidation wave
items.summary: Open interest held steady and funding stayed subdued during the recent liquidation wave, suggesting traders were de-risking rather than capitulating, according to HashKey Research's Tim Sun.

items.title: Tokenized stocks risk liquidity and revenue fragmentation: Research
items.summary: TradFi views the breakup of its previously consolidated, centralized liquidity as a “serious structural threat,” said Tiger Research director Ryan Yoon.

items.title: Trailmark turns code into graphs
items.summary: We’re open-sourcing Trailmark, a library that parses source code into a queryable call graph of functions, classes, call relationships, and semantic metadata, then exposes that graph through a Python API that Claude skills can call directly. Install it now: uv pip install trailma

items.title: $1.26B Bitcoin ETF outflows spark ‘contrarian’ buy signal: Santiment
items.summary: Ongoing Bitcoin ETF outflows have historically “correlated with conditions favorable for patient accumulation rather than panic," according to Santiment.

items.title: ‘Not unlikely’ Strategy will sell Bitcoin in 2026: Michael Saylor
items.summary: Strategy chairman Michael Saylor said the goal is to maximize Strategy’s Bitcoin per share by 2033.

items.title: Ethereum is still a good long-term buy, according data: Analyst
items.summary: Ethereum’s dominance in DeFi, stablecoins and staking is strengthening the long-term ETH accumulation thesis, despite it’s 28% price decline in 2026.

items.title: We hardened zizmor's GitHub Actions static analyzer
items.summary: In March 2026, attackers exploited a pull_request_target misconfiguration in the aquasecurity/trivy-action GitHub Action to exfiltrate organization and repository secrets, then used those credentials to backdoor LiteLLM on PyPI (see Trivy’s post-mortem for the full timeline). ziz

items.title: F2Pool founder who controls 11% of bitcoin's hashrate to lead first SpaceX mission to Mars
items.summary: Chun Wang, the first Mission Commander for SpaceX’s first commercial spaceflight to Mars, is crucial for the future transport of millions of tons of cargo and a million citizens to the Red Planet.

items.title: Robinhood Crypto COO Tanya Denisova is leaving company amid revenue slowdown
items.summary: Robinhood Crypto COO Tanya Denisova is leaving the firm after more than five years, as the trading platform navigates a sharp decline in crypto revenue and works to lessen its dependence on digital asset market cycles.

items.title: SEC Commissioner Peirce counters views that crypto rule will foster synthetic tokens
items.summary: Hester Peirce, the commissioner behind the SEC's Crypto Task Force, made statements on the now-delayed proposal, perhaps tamping down mistaken beliefs.

items.title: Why Minnesota is empowering local banks to fight Wall Street for crypto revenue
items.summary: A local banker told CoinDesk that in light of Wall Street’s aggressive push into the crypto industry, Minnesota's financial institutions could not afford to remain on the sidelines.

items.title: The agentic CFO in your pocket
items.summary: Chalom explains that retail investors have never had the opportunity to access and manage their own digital treasury desk. Until now.

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin heads lower late Friday as Warsh takes over at Fed
items.summary: Kevin Warsh was sworn in as Fed chairman in a White House ceremony early Friday afternoon.

items.title: IREN co-founder says AI’s biggest bottleneck is infrastructure, not chips
items.summary: Dan Roberts outlines IREN’s strategy to build a vertically integrated AI platform spanning power, data centers, GPUs and enterprise software.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR surges 19.4% as index trades flat
items.summary: Internet Computer (ICP), up 4.3% from Thursday, joined NEAR Protocol (NEAR) as a top performer.

items.title: Trump Media moved but 'did not sell' $205 million in bitcoin amid rising losses on crypto bets
items.summary: DJT’s bitcoin strategy remains under pressure as the company sits on hundreds of millions in unrealized crypto losses and widening quarterly deficits.
